recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Nothing in Common
recommendations.overview: A successful advertising executive finds his freewheeling life crashing to a halt when his parents end their longtime marriage.

recommendations.title: A Shock to the System
recommendations.overview: When experienced advertising executive Graham Marshall loses out on a promotion to a young man, he goes down in a path of vengeance.

recommendations.title: El mesero
recommendations.overview: A waiter pretends to be an important businessman in order to reach the upper class through his entrepreneurial dreams.

recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Soap and Water
recommendations.overview: A school janitor pretends to be a priest in order to give private lessons to a young top model.

recommendations.title: Sing Street
recommendations.overview: A boy growing up in Dublin during the 1980s escapes his strained family life by starting a band to impress the mysterious girl he likes.
